audit.summary: Zero Fox has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: contact page is not easy to verify.

findings.title: Contact page is not easy to verify
findings.evidence: No contact/enquiry/quote page candidate was captured from visible links.
findings.fix: Preserve or create a clear contact/quote page and link it from header, footer, and CTA blocks.

findings.title: Title does not target the main local intent
findings.evidence: Captured title: "ZERO FOX | bar & korean kitchen". Inferred keyword: "restaurant Restaurant".
findings.fix: Rewrite title around "restaurant Restaurant" while keeping the business name.

findings.title: H1 structure needs cleanup
findings.fix: Use one H1 focused on the primary service/location promise.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: No contact/enquiry/quote page candidate was captured from visible links.
proofPoints: 1008 Google reviews listed in Maps scrape
coldMessageDraft: Hey Zero, I was looking at Zero Fox in Brisbane. I noticed your site has a fixable trust gap: No contact/enquiry/quote page candidate was captured from visible links. I made a quick note on what I would tighten first; happy to send it over if useful.
followUpDraft: Quick follow-up on Zero Fox: the main opportunity I noticed is Preserve or create a clear contact/quote page and link it from header, footer, and CTA blocks.. Worth me sending the short audit?
guardrails: This is a draft, not a final send.
Do not mention review body text.
Do not claim Google API verification until it has been run.
Find email/contact path only after operator accepts the offer angle.
